label: Open Executive Summary
description: Move the report to the standalone executive summary card.

label: Open BBE Bloodwork
description: Move the report to the core equity-signal read and guardrail context.

label: Open Current Diagnosis
description: Move the report to the deterministic primary diagnosis.

label: Open Evidence Ledger
description: Move the report to supporting, complicating, and missing evidence.

label: Open Rule & Evidence Trace
description: Open the read-only drawer that shows the fired rule and evidence conditions.
spokenCue: Opening the rule and evidence trace.

label: Open Root Cause Explorer
description: Move the report to the demand path, price path, and binding constraint.

label: Open Prescription & Action Plan
description: Move the report to governed treatment paths, draft plan, proof signals, and roadmap.
spokenCue: Opening the prescription and action plan.

label: Open Follow-Up Signals
description: Move the report to the proof and follow-up signal area inside the action plan.

label: Highlight Demand Power
description: Spotlight the Demand Power KPI module.

label: Highlight Perceived Value
description: Spotlight the Perceived Value KPI module and keep the Pricing Power source-metric guardrail visible.

label: Select Top Treatment Path
description: Select the highest-ranked treatment path in the action plan.

label: Create Meeting Takeaway
description: Create a concise decision-ready takeaway from diagnosis, proof, caveat, and next signal.
